description:
Goal
Clean dump/debug/reporting paths after hot-path ownership boundaries are fixed so they do only the formatting and collection work required for their user-visible output.

Scope
- `src/lib.rs` dump emitters
- ordering/sorting code that formats structures only to compare them
- debug/reporting paths that clone intermediate strings or collections unnecessarily

Contract
- formatting happens at the outermost user-facing boundary
- intermediate sort/order logic uses structural ordering where available
- dump/debug code does not leak extra ownership requirements back into hot paths

Validation
- dump-related tests and manual output checks where necessary
- clippy sweep for redundant clone / implicit_clone
- full `cargo test --workspace` before close
title: Shrink dump and debug materialization paths
